items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of 'Pause without losing slot'.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Pause without losing slot', but the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the ability to pause for a vacation month without losing the preferred time permanently, but there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that this functionality is implemented, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
